name: Apocalyptic Spell
desc: Area affected by spell becomes difficult to move in

name: Aquatic Spell
desc: Spell functions normally underwater

name: Ascendant Spell
desc: Imitate mythic version of a spell

name: Authoritative Spell
desc: Spell forbids target from taking certain actions

name: Benthic Spell
desc: Modify a spell to inflict damage with pressurized water

name: Blissful Spell
desc: Target of spell takes combat penalties or gains bonuses on skills and saves

name: Bouncing Spell
desc: Redirect a spell that had no effect on initial target

name: Brackish Spell
desc: Modfy a spell to sheath you in protective seawater when cast

name: Brisk Spell
desc: Increase the speed of a granted movement type

name: Burning Spell
desc: Spell with the acid or fire descriptor deals extra damage the next round

name: Centered Spell
desc: Center a spells area on yourself

name: Cherry Blossom Spell
desc: Creatures that take damage from your spell have their age manipulated

name: Coaxing Spell
desc: Use mind-affecting spells to affect mindless oozes or vermin

name: Concussive Spell
desc: Spell with the sonic descriptor gains a debilitating concussive effect

name: Conditional Spell
desc: Apply conditional favor to a spell you cast

name: Consecrate Spell
desc: Maximize spell variables against evil creatures.
prerequisite: Aasimar, able to prepare or cast consecrate

name: Contagious Spell
desc: Spell spreads to those who fail to remove it

name: Contingent Spell
desc: Turn a healing spell into a contengent effect
prerequisite: Ability to cast cure spells (a cure spell is any spell with “cure” in its name)

name: Crypt Spell
desc: Damaging spell hinders resurrection or sickens undead

name: Dazing Spell
desc: Daze creature with spell damage

name: Delayed Spell
desc: Set a spell to trigger on a delay

name: Disruptive Spell
desc: Target of spell must make concentration check to cast a spell in the next round

name: Echoing Spell
desc: Cast a spell a second time

name: Eclipsed Spell
desc: Alter how your spells affect illumination

name: Ectoplasmic Spell
desc: Spell fully affects incorporeal and ethereal creatures

name: Elemental Spell
desc: Inflict energy damage instead of regular spell damage

name: Empower Spell
desc: Increase spell variables by 50%

name: Encouraging Spell
desc: Increase a granted moral bonus

name: Enlarge Spell
desc: Double spell range

name: Extend Spell
desc: Double spell duration

name: Familiar Spell
desc: Imbue your familiar with a spell, allowing it to cast the spell at a later time

name: Fearsome Spell
desc: Spell damage causes the shaken condition

name: Flaring Spell
desc: Spell with the fire, light, or electricity descriptor dazzles creatures it affects

name: Fleeting Spell
desc: Dismiss spell more easily

name: Focused Spell
desc: Increase save DC of spell for one target in a group

name: Furious Spell
desc: Spell deals more damage and can be cast while in a rage

name: Heighten Spell
desc: Treat spell as a higher level

name: Intensified Spell
desc: Increase maximum damage dice by 5 levels

name: Intuitive Spell
desc: Cast spell without thought components

name: Jinxed Spell
desc: Combine your jinxes with spells
prerequisite: Any two metamagic feats, Halfling Jinx trait

name: Latent Curse
desc: Alter curse spells to target objects instead of people

name: Lingering Spell
desc: Instantaneous area effect spell lasts for 1 round

name: Logical Spell
desc: Cast spell without emotion components

name: Maximize Spell
desc: Maximize spell variables

name: Merciful Spell
desc: Spell inflicts nonlethal damage instead of lethal

name: Murky Spell
desc: Cloud effects work underwater, with penalties

name: Persistent Spell
desc: Creatures who saved against a spell must save again

name: Piercing Spell
desc: Affected spell treats creatures with SR as having an SR of 5 lower

name: Quicken Spell
desc: Cast spell as a swift action

name: Reach Spell
desc: Increase spell range to higher range category

name: Rime Spell
desc: Spell with the cold descriptor also entangles creatures if the spell damages them

name: Scarring Spell
desc: Emotion or fear spell gives penalties against further such spells

name: Scouting Summons
desc: Possess a summoned creature
prerequisite: Spell Focus (conjuration), ability to cast magic jar

name: Seeking Spell
desc: Allow spells to bend around barriers

name: Selective Spell
desc: Exclude targets from an area effect spell

name: Shadow Grasp
desc: Entangle creatures caught within your darkness spells

name: Sickening Spell
desc: Sicken creature with spell damage

name: Silent Spell
desc: Cast spell without verbal components

name: Snuffing Spell
desc: Modify your magic to extinguish light sources

name: Solar Spell
desc: Enhance your light magic with the power of the sun

name: Solid Shadows
desc: Your shadow spells are 20% more real than normal

name: Stable Spell
desc: Cast spells in areas of primal magic with less chance of triggering a primal magic event

name: Steam Spell
desc: Use fire spells underwater without a caster level check

name: Still Spell
desc: Cast spell without somatic components

name: Studied Spell
desc: Spell uses Knowledge to bypass racial resistances

name: Stygian Spell
desc: Water spell causes memory loss to target

name: Stylized Spell
desc: Spell is difficult to identify and might be mistaken for a similar spell

name: Tenacious Spell
desc: Spell is difficult to dispel and remains for 1d4 rounds

name: Tenebrous Spell
desc: Alter a spell so it is stronger in darkness, but weaker in the light

name: Thanatopic Spell
desc: Affected spell's death effects, energy drain, and negative levels affect undead

name: Threatening Illusion
desc: Force enemies to think of your illusions as real threats

name: Threnodic Spell
desc: Change a mind-affecting spell so it can affect undead, but not living creatures

name: Thundering Spell
desc: Deafen creature with spell damage

name: Toppling Spell
desc: Spell with the force descriptor knocks targets prone

name: Toxic Spell
desc: Infuse a spell with the power of a poison
prerequisite: Craft (poison) 5 ranks, ability to cast 2nd-level spells, poison use class feature

name: Traumatic Spell
desc: Emotion or fear spell causes nightmares

name: Trick Spell
desc: Spells carry with them a dirty trick
prerequisite: Ability to cast 1st-level spells, chaotic neutral alignment, worshiper of Calistria

name: Tumultuous Spell
desc: Spell causes a target to move in a random direction

name: Umbral Spell
desc: Alter a spell to radiate darkness

name: Ursurping Spell
desc: Targets that fail their saving throw flank with you and can't make attacks of opportunity against you

name: Vast Spell
desc: Affect more creatures in an area

name: Verdant Spell
desc: Your spells can affect plant creatures

name: Widen Spell
desc: Double spell area

name: Yai-Mimic Spell
desc: Modify a ray spell to fire from your forehead, granting you brief regeneration
